Name: Raspberry Pi Pico Microcontroller (Type C Port)
Purpose: The main brain that controls the system.

Name: OLED Display I2C 4 Pin 0.96″ – Blue Characters
Purpose: Display games (Prints text and numbers used in games)

Name: Metal Momentary Push Button 2 pin 16mm
Purpose: give the user the ability to control games

Name: Rechargeable Li-ion Battery 18650 3.7V 3000mAh – with JST Cable 1S-1P+BMS (SAMSUNG Cell)
TP4056 TYPE-C Lithium Battery Charging Board Module 1A with Battery Protection
Purpose: Charges the battery from the direct USB-C port

Name: MT3608 DC-DC Boost Step up Converter 2A
Purpose: Boosts the 3.7V to match the Pico and other components volts need with a stable 5V

Name: ZERPOWER 5pcs SS12F15 SS12F15VG4 Toggle Switch 3Pin 1P2T Slide Switch Handle 2 Position High 4MM Push Button (19mm x 6mm) for PCB DIP
Purpose: gives the option to turn OFF/ON the device in order to toggle between the charging mode and the operating mode + used for safety
